headline: Is SMCI Still an AI Winner? The Bull vs Bear Case
summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) has whipsawed investors. headline: SMCZ vs. SMCX: Betting Against or All-In on Super Micro?

Both products from Defiance ETFs track the same underlying, Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI), with opposing 2x daily leverage. They look like polar opposites ...
